sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch postpones expected revenue and may signal internal execution challenges.

sentiment.reasoning: Missing revenue estimates by 10% is a significant negative indicator of current business performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
